text: Happy to share that our paper on backstepping boundary stabilization of coupled parabolic PDEs was accepted in Automatica. Grateful to my co-authors!
_note: Paste a public post link into "embed" (e.g. https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:1234567890123456789) to render the live post instead of this text.

text: New write-up: what “practical exponential stability” really means when you move from an infinite-dimensional plant to a data-driven reduced-order model.
Preprint out on adaptive boundary control of parabolic PDEs with unknown diffusivity — comments welcome.
